title: Domain Adaptation Path
description: Build fluency in Domain Adaptation inside Transfer Learning by moving from foundational terms into adjacent methods, variants, and extensions.

steps.title: Domain-Specific Adapters
steps.summary: Domain-Specific Adapters belongs to the Transfer Learning area of AI/ML, within Domain Adaptation. It sits inside Transfer Learning / Domain Adaptation. Start after Adapters.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: Domain-Specific Heuristics
steps.summary: Domain-Specific Heuristics belongs to the Transfer Learning area of AI/ML, within Domain Adaptation. It sits inside Transfer Learning / Domain Adaptation. Start after Domain Heuristics.
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: Cross-Domain Invariance Testing
steps.summary: Cross-Domain Invariance Testing belongs to the Transfer Learning area of AI/ML, within Domain Adaptation. It sits inside Transfer Learning / Domain Adaptation. Start after A/B Testing for Models.
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: Domain-Specific Features
steps.summary: Domain-Specific Features belongs to the Transfer Learning area of AI/ML, within Domain Adaptation. It sits inside Transfer Learning / Domain Adaptation. Compare it with Domain-Specific Heuristics and Domain-Specific Adapters.
steps.whyIncluded: Treat this as an advanced extension once the earlier terms feel natural.
